features.name: string to dynamic array cast
features.description: Code should include casting a string literal to a dynamic array of bytes using type'(string_var) syntax

features.name: dynamic array to string cast
features.description: Code should include casting a dynamic byte array to a string using string'(dynamic_array_var) syntax

features.name: string to queue cast
features.description: Code should include casting a string literal to a queue of bytes using type'(string_var) syntax

features.name: queue to string cast
features.description: Code should include casting a queue of bytes to a string using string'(queue_var) syntax
